$comment: Codex CLI hook config. Loaded automatically when the project root contains .codex/hooks.json (codex-cli >= 0.121). For earlier codex-cli, copy this content into ~/.codex/hooks.json or reference these paths from a Codex plugin manifest. The hook records every match but injects context only for explicit, non-advisory decisions so routine tool calls stay fast. Commands are wrapped in `bash -c` with a CODEX_PROJECT_DIR -> CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR -> $PWD fallback because Codex Desktop may not propagate CODEX_PROJECT_DIR to hook subprocesses.
